pr.title: Address review comments on PR #20
pr.body:
## Summary

Addresses all 5 review comments from @ewitulsk on PR #20:

1. **Rename `http.rs` ‚Üí `router.rs`** ‚Äî File renamed, all references updated in `lib.rs` and `main.rs`.
2. **Create `handlers/buckets.rs`** ‚Äî Moved `BucketDto`, `BucketsResponse`, and `list_buckets` handler into `handlers/buckets.rs`. Router now imports from the new module.
3. **Keep `build_cors` in `router.rs`** ‚Äî `build_cors` stays in `router.rs` alongside the server setup and health endpoint.
4. **Pull `indexer_client` into shared crate** ‚Äî Created `shared::indexer_client` with a generic `EventSink` trait. Both `api-service` and `quoting-service` implement `EventSink` for their respective `AppState` types. Removed the duplicate `indexer_client.rs` from both services. Updated `tests/src/lib.rs` to use the shared version.
5. **Pull `Bucket` struct into its own file** ‚Äî Extracted `Bucket` struct from `state.rs` into `bucket.rs` in `api-service`.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Verify the shared `EventSink` trait + generic `indexer_client::run` compiles and correctly dispatches events to each service's `AppState`
- [ ] Verify no regressions in quoting-service behavior after removing its local `indexer_client.rs`
- [ ] Run `cargo build` once the upstream `move-core-types` Sui dependency issue is resolved (pre-existing on `SO-33-mvp` ‚Äî the `framework/mainnet` branch of `mystenlabs/sui` has moved past the pinned commit)

### Notes
- `cargo check` fails on the base `SO-33-mvp` branch with `error: no matching package named move-core-types found` ‚Äî this is a pre-existing issue caused by the Sui `framework/mainnet` git branch advancing past the commit pinned in `Cargo.lock`. Not introduced by this PR.
- Code has been rustfmt-checked (edition 2021).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/1600072e62ba4d90baa17ab2c57df840
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
